name: origo
description: Origo plugins for Claude Cowork / Claude Code — Business Central integration and related tooling.

plugins.name: origo-bc
plugins.description: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central integration for Cowork via the Origo MCP endpoint at https://dynamics.is/api/mcp. Ships /origo-bc-setup, /origo-bc-add-env, /origo-bc-list-environments and /origo-bc-switch-company.
